title: Climate Home News
description: Climate change news, analysis, commentary, video and podcasts focused on developments in global climate politics

items.title: Ugandan farmers use British court to try to stop East Africa oil pipeline
items.description:

items.title: How small island states can make renewables the bedrock of resilience
items.description:

items.title: Dutch startup’s rust-powered batteries could help crack Europe’s energy storage gap
items.description:

items.title: Early warning systems are saving lives in Central Asia
